image.title: NAPI Johansson, M Bestle, P Søe-Jensen, KT Kristiansen, J Stensballe, NE Clausen, A Perner

item.title: The effect of prostacyclin (Iloprost) infusion at a dose of 1 ng/kg/min for 72 hours compared to placebo in mechanically ventilated patients with COVID-19: A structured summary of a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
